meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn how to leverage AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your MVP faster and reclaim your momentum.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from technical debt and cognitive load. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid iterative patching, you convert complex debugging into a streamlined, automated pipeline. This shift allows founders to focus on product-market fit rather than getting buried in syntax errors.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with a vision, code with passion, and then hit the wall: a cascade of obscure bugs that drains your velocity and kills your resolve. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking a system to handle the friction of high-speed development.

True founders don't debug line-by-line; they architect solutions that anticipate failure. By moving from manual troubleshooting to AI-augmented debugging, you transform technical debt from a project-killer into a manageable line item. It’s time to stop fighting your code and start commanding it to ship.

steps.title: Context Injection for Architectural Clarity
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with the full scope of the feature to avoid hallucinations. Define the desired state vs. current behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase architecture. Identify the root cause of the current bottleneck preventing feature completion. Map dependencies and suggest a refactor that prioritizes stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --context ./src --prompt 'Explain the current state of the auth module and why it fails under load.'

steps.title: Automated Error Trace Mapping
steps.description: Use Claude Code to ingest stack traces directly to identify the exact point of failure without manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent error logs. Correlate the stack trace with the last three commits to pinpoint the regression.

steps.title: Unit Test Generation for Regression Prevention
steps.description: Never fix a bug without writing a test to ensure it never returns. This secures your velocity for future sprints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the identified bug. Ensure it covers edge cases for user authentication failures.

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Once the bug is squashed, refactor the surrounding code to ensure it meets production standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current module for improved readability and performance. Reduce cyclomatic complexity while maintaining current functionality.

steps.title: Deployment Verification
steps.description: Automate the verification of the fix within your staging environment to ensure zero-downtime integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify the fix against the staging database and provide a summary of performance improvements.

pro_tips: Treat your codebase as a living document; use AI to maintain a 'README' that updates automatically with every major refactor.
Never accept the first AI-generated patch; always ask it to suggest three distinct implementation strategies before choosing.
Use Claude Code to generate 'self-documenting' code comments during the debugging process to save hours of future documentation work.
Integrate a CI/CD trigger that runs your AI-generated unit tests on every pull request to maintain high-velocity deployments.
If the AI gets stuck, ask it to 'simulate a senior engineer's code review' on its own previous output to catch logical traps.
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on one minor bug today, then scale it to your primary feature backlog to regain your product momentum.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical debt dictate your roadmap. By mastering AI-assisted debugging, you reclaim your role as a builder, not a maintainer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
